title: On Running Goes Public, Raising $746 Million in IPO
text: On Running went public in September 2021, raising approximately $746 million in the IPO (some sources cite $858 million including greenshoe). The Swiss athletic shoe and apparel company priced shares at $24 per share. The IPO represented a significant milestone for On, which was founded in 2010 and had grown to become a leading premium performance footwear brand. Proceeds from the IPO were designated to fund continued international expansion, retail store growth, and research and development for innovative shoe technologies. The successful IPO demonstrated strong investor confidence in On's business model and growth prospects in the competitive athletic footwear market.
